theme.rationale: The user requested a premium, stylish dark theme for a smart LED control app. Deep obsidian with vibrant glowing accents conveys high-end hardware and precision.

fonts.instructions: Use Outfit for major tab titles and mode names. Use IBM Plex Sans for numerical data (percentages, times, BLE details).

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, dense but readable. Cardless layout with glowing accents for interactive elements. Bottom floating tab bar.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: p-6 sm:p-8 for main containers. Ensure generous padding around sliders to prevent fat-finger issues.

sliders.type: custom HTML/Tailwind ranges or Shadcn Slider
sliders.style: Neumorphic inset track with intense glowing active track based on channel color. Thumb should be a crisp white circle with drop shadow.

bottom_nav.style: Glassmorphism, fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0, rounded-t-3xl bg-[#12121C]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/10 flex justify-between px-6 py-4 pb-8
bottom_nav.active_state: Text pure white, icon filled, small glowing dot indicator below

mode_cards.style: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors rounded-2xl p-4 border border-white/5 flex flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden

backgrounds.description: Dark atmospheric aquarium plant background. Use this faintly (opacity 10-20%) as a fixed background behind the main view to add depth without distracting from the controls.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react (Sliders, LayoutGrid, Sun, Timer, Settings). Keep stroke width at 1.5 for a premium thin look.

accessibility_and_motion.animations: Framer motion for tab transitions (slide in/out), smooth color transitions when dragging sliders.
accessibility_and_motion.contrast: Ensure all text labels above sliders are pure white for contrast.
accessibility_and_motion.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a mobile-first UI with a fixed bottom navigation bar containing 5 tabs: Kontrol, Modlar, Akvaryum, Zamanlayıcı, Ayarlar.
Implement the 5 channels (R, G, B, WW, CW) as highly styled vertical or horizontal sliders in the Kontrol tab.
Use deep obsidian background (#05050A) with the provided background image overlaid at 15% opacity and a backdrop blur on top to create depth.
Do NOT use teal or purple anywhere in the UI. Stick to the 5 functional LED colors for accents.
Ensure the app name 'OzLight' is prominently displayed in a sleek, elegant typography at the top of the Kontrol view.
In Modlar, list 11 plant/viewing modes as 2-column bento grids using mode_cards styling.
In Akvaryum, present the day simulation (6 phases + moonlight) as a timeline or sleek vertical list with time pickers.
In Zamanlayıcı, show a simple on/off schedule picker using Shadcn time pickers.
In Ayarlar, show BLE connection status, protocol info, and basic device settings.
